author: cristianoliveira
body:
Hello there :wave: 

While reviewing this PR: https://github.com/NixOS/nixpkgs/pull/402453 I wanted to test some stuff and for that I added the nix development in the project :) 

Once this is merged one can install it using 
```bash
nix profile install 'github:opencode-ai/opencode'
```
title: chore: adds nix and nixflakes environment
